judge_thought:
Explanation: The "led" column shows laps led per year. Only 1928 has any laps led (33), which is the most. All other listed years have 0 laps led, which is the fewest. Therefore, the correct years are:
- Most laps led: 1928
- Fewest laps led: any of the years with 0 (e.g., 1926, 1927, 1929, 1930, 1931, 1932, 1933, 1934, 1935, 1937, 1938, 1939)
The Prediction Answer lists all years together and does not correctly distinguish the single year with the most laps led (1928) from the years with the fewest (0). Hence it is incorrect.
